security_trigger_reason: F-0028 implementation changes protected support incident routes, support evidence persistence, owner-routed action handling, and idempotent replay behavior.

evidence: apps/core/src/platform/operator-api.ts:679 and :702 require F-0024 admission before support read routes; :734 and :777 parse bounded support bodies and require admission before POST/PATCH service invocation.

packages/contracts/src/operator-auth.ts:190-211 classifies support reads as read introspection and support writes as SUPPORT_OPERATION; :257-273 gives SUPPORT_OPERATION only to support_operator while observer/operator write attempts are forbidden by auth service checks.

apps/core/src/support/support-evidence.ts:199-231 redacts refs/actions/notes before hashing/persistence; :407-464 preserves the internal open action-routing claim replay result and rejects failed post-claim action routing; :476-560 rejects failed claimed update replay.

packages/db/src/support.ts:589-712 and :714-943 enforce request-id dedupe/conflict handling, claim/reject/apply state, closure-readiness blocking, and parameterized SQL; :949-967 limits incident listing through the service query.

Focused verification run passed: pnpm test -- --test-reporter=tap apps/core/test/support/support-evidence.contract.test.ts apps/core/test/platform/operator-support.integration.test.ts apps/core/test/security/operator-auth-service.contract.test.ts packages/db/test/support-store.integration.test.ts packages/contracts/test/support.contract.test.ts packages/contracts/test/operator-api.contract.test.ts (42 tests).

notes: Security audit r06 for commit 34542430341b: no confirmed exploitable findings. Reviewed support route RBAC/admission, evidence redaction/trust boundary, owner action routing, idempotency/replay, post-claim failure handling, first-attempt service failure status, incident listing bounds, and F-0024/F-0026 validation boundaries.
